message:
fix(vdbe): pass collation by reference in agg_func_p4 signature

Change `agg_func_p4` parameter from `&Option<String>` to
`Option<&String>` and update the call site in `codegen_select_aggregate`
to pass `agg.collation.as_ref()`.  This follows the idiomatic Rust
pattern of borrowing the inner value rather than borrowing the outer
Option, avoiding an unnecessary double-indirection and aligning with
clippy::ref_option_ref guidance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
